description: I am a Software Engineer, Competitive Programming and Problem Solving Enthusiast. I love learning new things like - programming languages, technology, design patterns, algorithms, data-structure and any other tech stuff you can name.

Currently I am working at Craftsmen Ltd, a startup, as a Software Development Engineer. My responsibilities involves fullstack software development on a web application for digitizing newsroom workflow.

I completed B.Sc in Computer Science and Engineering from Military Institute of Science & Technology(MIST). While doing so I was mostly into Competitive programming and Problem solving. I have solved around 800 programming problems using several data-structures and algorithms in different online judges. Also I participated in several online and onsite national programming contests including two ACM-ICPC regionals. I also built several pet projects as a student and even while doing a full time job.
